name: CASEYS GENERAL STORES INC
business: The Company operates convenience stores primarily under the names 'Casey's' and 'Casey's General Store' throughout 19 states. All stores carry a broad selection of food items, beverages, tobacco and nicotine products, groceries, health and beauty aids, automotive products, and other non-food items. All but six store locations offer fuel.
sellsTo: Rural and small-town consumers (approximately 71% of stores in areas with populations fewer than 20,000)

exposures.sentence: As of April 30, 2026, the Company has 282 charging stations at 64 stores, across 14 states.

Our business and our reputation could be adversely affected by a cyber or data security incident or the failure to protect sensitive guest, Team Member or supplier data, or the failure to comply with applicable regulations relating to data security and privacy.
The selection is a blend of differentiated private label products, as well as favored national and regional brands.

catalysts.event: Introduction of new three-year strategic plan
catalysts.sentence: The Company will introduce a new a three-year strategic plan in June 2026.
